lifecycle.name: Cert & Ops Setup
lifecycle.description: Certificate application, GOM authoring, regulatory baseline

lifecycle.name: Fleet & Airworthiness
lifecycle.description: AD/SB tracking, component life, maintenance, parts, duty enforcement

lifecycle.name: Crew Management
lifecycle.description: Quals, training, medicals, dispatch, FRAT, W&B

lifecycle.name: Flight Operations
lifecycle.description: Weather, flight following, safety reporting, FOQA, ERP, post-flight

lifecycle.name: Safety & SMS
lifecycle.description: Hazard register, SMS monitoring, AI safety officer

lifecycle.name: Revenue & Customer
lifecycle.description: Charter quoting, billing, medevac billing, customer portal

lifecycle.name: Compliance & Audit
lifecycle.description: Alex CoS, FAR monitor, drug/alcohol, crew scheduling, reserve/swap

lifecycle.name: Intelligence Layer
lifecycle.description: Airport intel, NOTAM intel, EFB, training courseware, crew housing

workers.name: Part 135 Certificate Assistant
workers.capabilitySummary: Guides operators through initial Part 135 certification or amendment process

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Certificate application status, ops spec amendments pending

workers.name: GOM / POI Authoring
workers.capabilitySummary: Authors and maintains General Operations Manual and Principal Operations Inspector submissions

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: GOM revision status, pending POI submissions

workers.name: Regulatory Compliance Monitor
workers.capabilitySummary: Monitors FAR changes and flags impact on operator certificate and GOM

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Pending FAR changes, compliance impact flags

workers.name: Aircraft Status & MEL Tracker
workers.capabilitySummary: Real-time airworthiness status for every aircraft on the certificate. MEL deferrals, NEF, CDL, and placarded items tracked and fed to dispatch.

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Aircraft airworthiness status per tail, MEL restrictions, maintenance due alerts

workers.name: AD/SB Compliance Tracker
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks airworthiness directives and service bulletins against fleet compliance status

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: AD/SB compliance status, upcoming due dates, emergency ADs

workers.name: Component & Life Tracker
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks component time remaining, overhaul intervals, and life-limited parts

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Component life remaining, upcoming overhauls, life-limited parts alerts

workers.name: Maintenance Work Order & Logbook
workers.capabilitySummary: Creates and tracks maintenance work orders, journey log entries, and return-to-service sign-offs

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Open work orders, pending return-to-service, journey log status

workers.name: Parts & Inventory Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages parts inventory, reorder points, and vendor relationships for maintenance operations

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Parts inventory levels, critical shortages, pending orders

workers.name: Flight & Duty Time Enforcer
workers.capabilitySummary: Hard stops on illegal crew assignments. Validates every proposed assignment against 14 CFR 135.267 before it reaches the board.

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Crew legality status, duty limit alerts, daily crew legality summary

workers.name: Qualification & Currency Tracker
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks pilot qualifications, type ratings, check ride currency, and instrument proficiency

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Pilot currency status, upcoming check ride dates, expiring qualifications

workers.name: Training Records Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages recurrent training schedules, completion records, and regulatory training requirements

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Upcoming training requirements, overdue training alerts

workers.name: Medical & Certificate Tracker
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks medical certificate dates, classes, BasicMed eligibility, and certificate limitations

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Medical certificate status, upcoming expirations

workers.name: Mission Builder & Dispatch
workers.capabilitySummary: Assembles complete mission package -- aircraft airworthiness, crew legality, weather authorization, customer requirements, ground logistics -- before any flight is authorized.

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Active missions, dispatch status, pre-departure anomalies

workers.name: Flight Risk Assessment (FRAT)
workers.capabilitySummary: FRAT score gates dispatch authorization. Pilot completes FRAT before every flight. Elevated score requires documented CP override.

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: FRAT scores across active missions, risk patterns

workers.name: Weight & Balance Calculator
workers.capabilitySummary: Calculates weight and balance for each mission against aircraft-specific envelopes

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: W&B status for active missions

workers.name: Weather Intelligence
workers.capabilitySummary: Aggregates METARs, TAFs, SIGMETs, AIRMETs, PIREPs, and TFRs with plain-language translation

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Weather conditions for active and planned missions

workers.name: Flight Following & Tracking
workers.capabilitySummary: Real-time flight tracking with position reporting and ETA management

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Active flight positions, ETAs, overdue position reports

workers.name: Safety Reporting (SMS)
workers.capabilitySummary: Voluntary safety reporting system with anonymous submission and trend analysis

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Recent safety reports, trend summary

workers.name: FOQA / Flight Data Analysis
workers.capabilitySummary: Flight operational quality assurance -- analyzes flight data for exceedances and trends

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: FOQA exceedance summary, flight data trends

workers.name: Emergency Response (ERP)
workers.capabilitySummary: Emergency response plan management with automated notification cascades

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: ERP status, active incidents

workers.name: Post-Flight Debrief
workers.capabilitySummary: Replaces Protean OASIS workflow -- auto-populated post-flight debriefs from flight data

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Post-flight debrief status, pending squawks

workers.name: Hazard & Risk Register
workers.capabilitySummary: Maintains hazard identification and risk assessment register per SMS requirements

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Open hazards, risk assessment status, pending mitigations

workers.name: SMS Performance Monitor
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks safety performance indicators and safety objectives against targets

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Safety performance indicators, objectives tracking

workers.name: AI Safety Officer
workers.capabilitySummary: AI-assisted safety analysis with pattern detection across all safety data sources

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Safety analysis summary, detected patterns, recommendations

workers.name: Charter Quoting Engine
workers.capabilitySummary: Generates charter quotes based on aircraft costs, fuel, crew, landing fees, and margin

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Pending quotes, quote conversion rate

workers.name: Accounts Receivable & Billing
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages customer invoicing, payment tracking, and accounts receivable for charter operations

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: AR aging summary, overdue payments, billing status

workers.name: Medevac Billing & Collections
workers.capabilitySummary: Specialized medical transport billing -- Medicare, Medicaid, private insurance, No Surprises Act compliance

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Medevac billing status, pending claims, collection rates

workers.name: Customer Portal Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Customer-facing portal for trip requests, itineraries, and document sharing

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Pending trip requests, customer satisfaction

workers.name: Alex -- Chief of Staff
workers.capabilitySummary: Cross-worker orchestration, anomaly detection, escalation routing. 0500 ops briefing to CP and DOM. Monitors all Vault events.
tier1Compliance: Tier 0 enforcement only -- orchestrator has no direct regulatory requirement

workers.name: FAR Compliance Monitor
workers.capabilitySummary: Monitors Federal Aviation Regulation changes and flags impact on operations

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: FAR change alerts, compliance gap status

workers.name: Drug & Alcohol Program Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages DOT/FAA drug and alcohol testing program -- random selection, scheduling, record keeping

workers.name: Crew Scheduling & Roster
workers.capabilitySummary: Builds and publishes crew schedules with every assignment pre-validated for legality before reaching the board.

workers.name: Reserve & Crew Swap Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages reserve pilot activation and crew swap requests with legality validation

workers.name: Airport & Helipad Intelligence
workers.capabilitySummary: Airport and helipad database with approach notes, hazards, FBO reviews, and LZ status

workers.name: NOTAM Intelligence
workers.capabilitySummary: NOTAM filtering, translation to plain English, and impact assessment for planned routes

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: EFB status, flight plan filing status

workers.name: AI Training & Courseware
workers.capabilitySummary: Adaptive training modules, recurrent training management, and FAA knowledge test prep

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Training assignments, completion rates, knowledge test results

workers.name: Crew Housing Coordinator
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages crew housing reservations coordinated with crew schedule changes

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Crew housing status, pending reservations

workers.name: Digital Logbook
workers.capabilitySummary: Blockchain-verified personal flight logbook. Replaces paper permanently. Auto-imports from ForeFlight, Schedaero, FVO. PRIA-ready export.

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Recent flights, cumulative totals, PRIA status

workers.name: Currency & Medical Tracker
workers.capabilitySummary: Real-time currency dashboard -- am I legal for this flight? Day/night landings, instrument currency, flight review, medical class tracking.

alexRegistration.briefingContribution: Personal currency status, medical expiry

workers.capabilitySummary: Type-specific V-speeds, W&B calculator, checklists, performance data, systems descriptions. ForeFlight sync.

workers.capabilitySummary: Personal FRAT, weather briefing in plain language, NOTAM filtering, personal minimums enforcement.

workers.capabilitySummary: Personal aviation assistant. Daily briefing, currency nudges, training reminders. Same worker as AV-029 in personal context.

bundles.name: Operator Essential
bundles.description: Wave 1 core operations package -- dispatch, duty enforcement, aircraft status, risk assessment, scheduling, and Alex orchestration
bundles.replaces: Scattered spreadsheets, manual duty tracking, phone-based dispatch coordination

bundles.name: Operator Complete
bundles.description: Full Part 135/91 operations suite -- all 38 workers covering cert through intelligence
bundles.replaces: Ramco + Aladtec + Protean + SharePoint + manual processes -- $10K+/mo in software and labor

bundles.name: Pilot Pro
bundles.description: Complete personal pilot toolkit -- logbook, currency, aircraft profiles, training, flight planning, and Alex
bundles.replaces: LogTen Pro + ForeFlight companion apps + paper logbook + manual currency tracking
